security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes can be manipulated without sufficient validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks robust validation of vote inputs.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate the integrity of vote messages.
The actor is able to modify vote data before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement input validation and integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may alter vote data to change the outcome of a governance proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Lack of non-repudiation mechanisms for votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not guarantee the authenticity of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not provide mechanisms for tracing the origin of votes.
The actor can cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement non-repudiation mechanisms for votes using digital signatures.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement, making it difficult to trace malicious actors.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be leaked due to insufficient protection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not fully protect the confidentiality of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not encrypt vote data.
The actor is able to access the database holding the votes.

mitigation.strategy: Implement encryption and access controls to protect vote data confidentiality.

description: An attacker may gain access to voter data and disclose sensitive information.
